description_long: This object is a striking, fantasy-inspired sword with a highly stylized, aggressive blade profile. The blade is predominantly metallic blue with a glossy finish, featuring multiple jagged, angular protrusions and a dramatic, curved lower edge. The upper edge of the blade is serrated with pronounced spikes, while the lower section includes a large, open cutout, giving it a unique silhouette. The handle is relatively short and cylindrical, appearing to be made of a darker material, possibly metal or a synthetic composite, and is integrated seamlessly into the blade. There is no visible crossguard, and the overall design emphasizes aesthetics and intimidation over practicality. The sword's construction and finish suggest it is intended as a display or ceremonial piece rather than a functional weapon.
description: A glossy, metallic blue fantasy sword with jagged, serrated edges and a dramatic, openwork blade. The handle is short and dark, with no visible guard.
description_view_0: The sword is seen from the side, showcasing its jagged, serrated blade and large open cutout near the base.
description_view_1: A top-down view reveals the thinness of the blade and the handle, emphasizing the sword's narrow profile.
description_view_2: The opposite side view highlights the dramatic curves and spikes of the blade, as well as the openwork section.
description_view_3: A bottom-up view shows the pointed tip and the alignment of the handle with the blade's central axis.
attribute_blade_type: curved, jagged, single-edged, serrated fantasy blade with openwork
attribute_handle_design: short, cylindrical, dark-colored, smooth, integrated with blade
